description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests - DeFiCh/go-ethlibs that runs on push to master, pull requests to master, and workflow dispatch. The workflow should run in parallel but cancel in-progress runs for non-master branches. It should set up an ubuntu-latest environment with a defi/ain-builder container, then build and upload binaries, and run node RPC tests with Go 1.17.0 or higher.
